name: Herbed Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup peeled, seeded and chopped tomatoes
4 medium carrots, sliced into 1/2 inch pieces
4 small round red potatoes, peeled and sliced into 1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large saucepan with cooking spray, place over medium heat until hot.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté 3 minutes or until tender.
3. Add water, tomatoes, carrots, red potatoes, and chicken bouillon granules. Bring to a boil.
4. Cover, reduce heat and simmer 30 minutes or until carrots are tender. Set aside.
5. Process half of the vegetables and cooking liquid in a food processor until smooth.
6. Transfer the puree to a large bowl.
7. Add buttermilk, lemon juice, marjoram, thyme, and white pepper to the vegetable puree. Stir well.
8. Cover and refrigerate 8 hours.
9. Stir before serving. Garnish with fresh thyme if desired. Serve chilled. (Fat 1.4, Cholesterol 0.)
